name: cklph-audit
description: Scoped, adversarially-verified, agentic whole-repo audits. Decompose the codebase, fan out a sub-agent per subsystem × lens, run a deterministic tool for recall, refute each finding to kill false positives, drop accepted-baseline items, and synthesize a triaged report + remediation-wave plan. Read-only in v1. Lenses: security, correctness, architecture.
